title: 荣誉附件正文｜Award Zhang Shuhao（第2部分）
content:
cRF Tier 1 project. h. School ACR shall ensure PI submits a Tier 1 proposal is to be submitted through the School within one year from project end date. Title of Proposal PI Start Date Grant Awarded Duration Amount Parallelized Stateful Coreset Asst Prof Zhang 01 Aug 2024 3 Years S$100,000 Selection in Continuous Data Shuhao Streams for Enhanced Stream Learning The School declines the grant award.

Chair of School --------------------------------------------------------------------- --------------------------------------------- Name Signature --------------------------------------------- Date Principal Investigator I undertake that: • I declare that I have not received concurrent funding from another funding agency for a substantially similar programme. • I will ensure my project spending adheres closely to the expenditures as specified in the proposal. • I will ensure timely completion of project and satisfactory utilization of research funds. • I will deliver the research output indicated in the research proposal. • I will submit as Lead PI, a White paper for MOE AcRF Tier 1 Call within one year from project completion. • I will keep the School and the College informed of any significant output or achievements for the grant through: - Final Report - Whenever there are new publications or whenever the results of research are applied, commercialized etc. Zhang Shuhao --------------------------------------------------------------------- --------------------------------------------- Name Signature 8/3/2024 --------------------------------------------- Date
